meta.title: For the Promise
meta._provenance: Populated retroactively from the author's roadmap (planning/source-roadmap.md). Chapters 1-4 and 5 (first half) are written by the author; summaries here record the roadmap and must be reconciled against the actual prose when it is added to draft/chapters/.

1.title: The Arrival
1.summary: Campfire in the Blackwood Forest; Brunor and Elaine on the road before Glintgate; the clearing, the rabbits, the two moons. Flashback to the watchtower in Hudria and Johanna's words about the stone, legacy, and carrying a name. The Silver Road into Glintgate; Mikah at the gate; a city that hates them and they hate back. Frederick already waiting inside. Establishes the Archwarden's summons.

2.title: The Square
2.summary: Followed since the gate (the necklace, the man in the alley). Damien's messenger at Bordou Square; Brunor's dagger at his throat. Damien arrives with guards: insults, accusations about Alessa's ambush, the Naaren spy counter-accusation. Damien draws on Elaine; Brunor accepts the contest of arms. Ends as the duel begins.

3.title: The Keep
3.summary: Caer Seryth. Phoebe struggles with her training sequence; Tella corrects her. Phoebe worries about Elaine in Damien's city, Brunor's restlessness, Frederick barely cleared by West. Tella reminds her who trained Elaine — words like daggers, swords like bargaining chips; the riftmark's weight; Damien's fear. Phoebe whispers the truth Tella didn't say: dangerous to her enemies and to herself.

4.title: The Duel
4.summary: Bordou Square in the rain. Brunor reads Damien's court fencing over spearman's instincts. First blood to Damien. Psychological warfare (Uthred, Elaine, Alessa); Brunor charges; duel becomes brawl. Elaine parts them, parrying both blades — Nullbrand and the golden blade. Damien's parting words: Golden Scale guildhall by week's end. The rain argument about Alessa; ends in silence.

5.title: The Tavern / The Council
5.summary: FIRST HALF (written): the inn; the mark floods Elaine with the room's noise; Beatrice eyes Frederick; Frederick admits he knew about Alessa ('Two ropes...'); the Scaleblade reveal — Celisia at the gate, the void, charcoal on the handkerchief; the Order followed them in. SECOND HALF (to draft): one week later, the Council chamber — the Wyrshade confession, the butchery, the voice, the Vel'Era escort contract; the trio neither accepts nor refuses.

6.title: The Golden Scale and the Hunt
6.summary: TO DRAFT: Frederick and Elaine at the Golden Scale guildhall face Damien's wife instead of Damien; Brunor hunts the Order through the city and learns it is infrastructure — and aware. Convergence: three problems at once. The Glintgate arc has its teeth in them.

brunor.emotional_state: Restless; silent toward Elaine after the rain argument; war-shaped stillness after the Council confession

knows.fact: Something about Alessa he has kept from Elaine (content TBD)
The Council's Wyrshade confession, the voice, the Vel'Era contract offer

relationships.elaine: Fractured — argument ended in silence; she still trusts him with the hunt
relationships.frederick: Frederick covered for him at the tavern; debt open

elaine.emotional_state: Fury cooled into working focus; carrying unsayable knowledge

knows.fact: Kymancy / Detect Memory — recognized the Wyrshade's assault for what it was
The Throng hive mind, from Melody's Book 1 intelligence and the Scaleblades
Celisia deliberately revealed herself at the gate

relationships.damien: He fears her; drew on her anyway

frederick.emotional_state: Counting the cost of yes and the cost of no

knows.fact: Knew about Alessa; admitted it at the tavern
The Council's confession and contract offer

relationships.brunor: Refused to let him take the blame alone

phoebe.emotional_state: Worried about the trio; frustrated with her training sequence

knows.fact: Elaine is dangerous to her enemies and to herself

relationships.tella: Student — rough warmth and hard truths

tella.emotional_state: Steady; withholding one truth about Elaine

established_facts.fact: Story opens 8th of Ashenfall, 982 A.M. — Late Summer, Month of Death (The Stranger)
Johanna's Promise delivered the Wyrshade to the Council
Fifteen Council researchers went mad from the Wyrshade's vision assault (the Rift, the rune, what waits inside) and butchered each other; mages destroyed them with fire
A voice spoke through a burning researcher in an unidentified tongue, transcribed phonetically, untranslated
First Era records suggest the tongue connects to something old sleeping in the deep forests of Vel'Era
The Council's researchers are actually looking for a slumbering drake; the Promise was not told
The Order's presence in Glintgate is infrastructure, not a cell — and it is aware of being investigated
The full Thirteen traveled to Glintgate and will not say why
Kymancy contains Detect Memory: the caster taps the history of a place and sees it
Damien's fighting style is court fencing built on a spearman's instincts
Tauvor: pale, sickly, muscular, black hair to his neck, measured purposeful voice

planted.thread: The Archwarden's Silence — why the Thirteen traveled to Glintgate
Brunor's unsaid thing; Frederick's covering debt
Damien's blindness — protects or dooms him
Alessa — ambush, accusation, Naaren spy counter-accusation
Caelus — the void may be his influence, not Celisia's nature
The Poisoned Contract — used twice for the same catastrophe

timeline.1: 8th of Ashenfall, 982 A.M. (night, Blackwood Forest) to next morning (Glintgate)
timeline.2: Same arc as ch1 arrival (exact day TBD)
timeline.3: Concurrent with the Glintgate events (Caer Seryth)
timeline.5: First half: after the duel. Second half: one week after the tavern

blackwood_forest.description: Forest on the road before Glintgate; campfire, clearing, rabbits, two moons

glintgate.description: Hostile city; Damien's power base; Bordou Square; Golden Scale guildhall

caer_seryth.description: Johanna's Promise home keep; training yard

vel_era.description: Deep forests; expedition target; something old sleeps there

the_archive.description: Council repository; Wyrshade disaster site; oldest First Era records

brunor:elaine.status: Fractured by the Alessa argument; silence; conditional trust holds

brunor:frederick.status: Debt open — Frederick covered for him

elaine:frederick.status: Working trust; he grounds her at the guildhall

trio:damien.status: Contest of arms fought; negotiation via his wife

trio:council.status: Employer with confessed disaster; contract pending
